verification_notes: 18 holes, par 70, 5,572 yards confirmed. Year 1992 confirmed. Originally Muang Ake Vista Golf Course; rebranded as RSU Vista Golf Course in 2022 under RSU Vista Golf Course Company Limited management. The course retains the same layout and GPS location. Green fees: 700 THB (green fee + caddie, weekday special); cart adds 500 THB; prime-time rate 1,000 THB all-in. Night golf available. Marked provisional: slug reflects legacy name used in the pipeline brief; rebranding should be noted prominently in content.
disputes: Course was rebranded RSU Vista Golf Course in 2022 — the slug and pipeline brief use the legacy name 'Muang Ake Vista Golf Course'. Both names are in active use on golf databases.
Par 70 (6 par-3 holes) is unusual; confirmed by multiple sources including 1golf.eu and GolfPass.

name.value: Muang Ake Vista Golf Course (now RSU Vista Golf Course)

prose.overview: Originally known as Muang Ake Vista Golf Course and rebranded RSU Vista Golf Course in 2022, this compact 18-hole layout is the second course developed by the Muang Ake Group in Pathum Thani, sitting adjacent to its sister course Muang Ake Golf Course in Lak Hok. The Vista layout has a distinctive character within the Muang Ake complex: at only 5,572 yards with a par of 70 and six par-three holes, it plays as a precision course rather than a power test, demanding accurate iron play and sharp putting on its well-watered greens. Its most unique feature is a full floodlighting system installed throughout the course, making it one of very few true 18-hole night-golf venues in Thailand — a compelling option for golfers who want to play after Bangkok's fierce afternoon heat. The facility is operated under the Rangsit University (RSU) umbrella following its 2022 rebrand, and maintains the affordable pricing policy the Muang Ake Group has long been known for.
prose.layout_and_experience: The Vista layout's par-70 design with six par-threes gives it a rhythm unlike any standard course in the Bangkok region: players alternate regularly between short-iron challenges and straightforward par-fours, with two par-fives providing the few opportunities to score with power. Water hazards appear on most holes — the course description notes this as the primary obstacle — and the relatively short yardage means that water penalties carry more weight than on longer layouts where a poor drive can be recovered. The full floodlighting system allows play from 15:00 through to midnight (except Sundays), giving the Vista its identity as a night-golf destination. The greens are well-maintained and receptive under lights, and the experience of playing an 18-hole course at night in the Bangkok suburbs is genuinely distinctive.
prose.tips: For night golf, arrive by 17:00 to get a tee time in the prime early-evening window when conditions are comfortable. The par-three holes demand precision — miss the green and water penalties stack up quickly. Daytime play is best in the early morning when the greens are freshest. The 700 THB weekday rate includes green fee and caddie — a cart costs an additional 500 THB. The facility is directly accessible from Don Mueang Airport (approximately 10–15 minutes), making it ideal for a quick round during a long airport layover or on arrival/departure day.
prose.location_and_access: RSU Vista Golf Course (formerly Muang Ake Vista) is located in Lak Hok, Mueang Pathum Thani, Pathum Thani, adjacent to the original Muang Ake Golf Course. It is approximately 30 km from central Bangkok, around 35 minutes via Phahonyothin Highway (Highway 1). Don Mueang Airport is about 10–15 minutes south by car. No direct public transport; taxi or Grab is required from Mo Chit or Don Mueang.
prose.rental_cta_context: Night golf at RSU Vista is a Bangkok bucket-list experience — make it even smoother by arranging LENGOLF club rentals delivered to your hotel, so you arrive at the floodlit course ready to play without a rental counter queue.
